title: Kilrock Service Pro Coffee Machine Descaler & Cleaner 2 x 150ml - Suitable for both automatic and manual machines - Leaves no residue, odours or aftertaste, Black
features: ✓ ELIMINATES LIMESCALE: From espresso and coffee machines, improving performance and lengthening appliance lifespan

✓ SPECIALISED FORMULA : This special formula descales all coffee machines and one cup boilers without leaving an aftertaste It improves the performance of your machine and leaves no residue, odours or foul tastes
✓ VERSATILE AND EFFECTIVE: Versatile - Works on automatic, semi-auto and manual machines Effective - Fast and effective formula improves machine efficiency and the flavour of drinks
✓ EASY TO USE : Simply pour a bottle of this descaler into your water tank and let the solution run through the machine

✓ MADE IN THE UK : From our factory in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, we design, formulate, blend, fill, pack, sell and distribute a full range of specialist household problem-solving and cleaning products
description: Product Description Keep your coffee machine pristine clean and working at its best with this powerful Kilrock Espresso & Coffee Machine Descaler. It improves the performance of your machine and leaves no residue, odours or foul tastes.  Ingredients Amidosulphonic acid, inhibitor
